productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue & Black Check Shirt
description: Style Note casual shirts from adidas take style and comfort to an all new level. Paired with chinos, this check shirt is a must have in your evening wear wardrobe. You can also pair it with jeans for a casual look on your day off. Product Details Blue and black check shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
